name: RunLLMSkill
friendlyName: SkillFlow — Run LLM Skills on PR
description: Automatically discovers and runs all LLM Skills defined in .azdo/skills/ against the current Pull Request. Supports Claude, OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, and Ollama.
helpMarkDown: Place your Skill `.md` files in `.azdo/skills/` in your repository. All skills found there will be executed automatically. See the [SkillFlow documentation](https://github.com/simonebittidev/skillflow) for details.
author: SkillFlow

inputs.name: skillsDir
inputs.label: Skills Directory
inputs.helpMarkDown: Path to the directory containing Skill `.md` files, relative to the repository root. Defaults to `.azdo/skills`. All `.md` files in this directory will be executed.

inputs.name: verbose
inputs.label: Verbose Logging
inputs.helpMarkDown: Enable verbose logging to see the agent's reasoning steps for each Skill.

inputs.name: langsmith_project
inputs.label: LangSmith Project
inputs.helpMarkDown: LangSmith project name for tracing. Leave empty to disable tracing.

inputs.name: langsmith_api_key_var
inputs.label: LangSmith API Key Variable Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: Name of the environment variable containing the LangSmith API key.
